name: It's a Dog's Life with Bill Farmer
original_name: It's a Dog's Life with Bill Farmer
overview: As the iconic voice of Goofy and Pluto for more than 30 years, Disney Legend Bill Farmer steps out from behind the microphone to meet his own favorite characters — dogs! Join Bill as he crosses the country meeting dogs doing incredible work!

trailers.title: It’s A Dog’s Life | Official Trailer | Disney+
